blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,615 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: dry, highs of 45°F, winds around 21 mph.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
